title: Custom PVP weapons (Made for lifesteal)
description: Made this mod for a lifesteal server with some friends, but im posting it here in case anyone wants to use it
body:
Adds tools:

Amythest knife
Copper knife
Quartz knife
Echo knife

Weapons that need cheats to access:

Sword of vision: Gives Darkness and Glowing effects to the target
Poison knife: Applys poison with each hit, amplifys the effect with more hits
Weakness axe: Applys weakness to the target

Whats knifes do:

Knifes are a faster attacking weapon than a sword which can also break sheilds, they don't mine any blocks faster than using your hand though. They are crafted from ores/gems that u can NOT use for normal tools/weapons
